title: Round whole numbers
description: Practice rounding whole numbers to the nearest hundred or thousand.
topic_path: Get ready for decimal place value

hints:
![The same number line as above, with the point 1,627,187 appearing closer to point 1,627,190](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/834baef4532dd98098b2dbd1139c10a77f5bdb52)

$1{,}627{,}187$ is closer to $1{,}627{,}190$.
The nearest ten is $1{,}627{,}190$.

$954$ is between $900$ and $1000$.

![A number line with the points 900 and 1000 labeled](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/afe458ee2e9e3877c0192fb05eb3b9e54d94c32b)

Is $954$ closer to $900$ or $1000$?

![The same number line as above, with the point 954 appearing closer to point 1000](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/a851a0d30f402719404fb87249ebc9a439c9d83e)

$954$ is closer to $1000$.
The nearest hundred is $1000$.

$21{,}253$ is between $21{,}200$ and $21{,}300$.

![A number line with the points 21,200 and 21,300 labeled](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/86fd659f26ccb5d78b51572f0b2ef658723e76de)

Is $21{,}253$ closer to $21{,}200$ or $21{,}300$?

![The same number line as above, with the point 21,253 appearing closer to point 21,300](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/7c9ba944de3a4b4310319c4ee8f3028984829e74)

$21{,}253$ is closer to $21{,}300$.
The nearest hundred is $21{,}300$.

![The same number line as above, with the point 5,836,197 appearing closer to point 5,836,200](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/c856dd52f4b4f6a712e03790777b2468d55fd488)

$5{,}836{,}197$ is closer to $5{,}836{,}200$.
The nearest hundred is $5{,}836{,}200$.

$80{,}531$ is between $80{,}000$ and $81{,}000$.

![A number line with the points 80,000 and 81,000 labeled](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/4a397eab4c705c9234e318633772076913885e22)

Is $80{,}531$ closer to $80{,}000$ or $81{,}000$?

![The same number line as above, with the point 80,531 appearing closer to point 81,000](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/a28d5ea175186a65780811b852422e4debdb8250)

$80{,}531$ is closer to $81{,}000$.
The nearest thousand is $81{,}000$.

$241{,}639$ is between $241{,}000$ and $242{,}000$.

![A number line with the points 241,000 and 242,000 labeled](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/e8582416f8451682b3553912644ef8c229ac8517)

Is $241{,}639$ closer to $241{,}000$ or $242{,}000$?

![The same number line as above, with the point 241,639 appearing closer to point 242,000](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/d024322ee43e23fb4548e848e5e17353232d2880)

$241{,}639$ is closer to $242{,}000$.
The nearest thousand is $242{,}000$.

![The same number line as above, with the point 3,942,588 appearing closer to point 3,943,000](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/d151b4ce4eb9818a61550c3cfd390a18ae8b813e)

$3{,}942{,}588$ is closer to $3{,}943{,}000$.
The nearest thousand is $3{,}943{,}000$.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Round $66{,}681$ to the nearest ten thousand.**

[[☃ numeric-input 1]]
hints:
$66{,}681$ is between $60{,}000$ and $70{,}000$.

![A number line with the points 60,000 and 70,000 labeled](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/a3bef71a61291c8906da4e25df45894a542e6648)

Is $66{,}681$ closer to $60{,}000$ or $70{,}000$?

![The same number line as above, with the point 66,681 appearing closer to point 70,000](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/93d710cd78112f11261c424a7e8eb25cc8dd9f73)

$66{,}681$ is closer to $70{,}000$.
The nearest ten thousand is $70{,}000$.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Round $258{,}177$ to the nearest hundred thousand.**

[[☃ numeric-input 1]]
hints:
$258{,}177$ is between $200{,}000$ and $300{,}000$.

![A number line with the points 200,000 and 300,000 labeled](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/277671e52ac15ebe141c042b18508387cf552d98)

Is $258{,}177$ closer to $200{,}000$ or $300{,}000$?

![The same number line as above, with the point 258,177 appearing closer to point 300,000](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/b518ebaa098fb3f57a00621bd3420466daa9a6ea)

$258{,}177$ is closer to $300{,}000$.
The nearest hundred thousand is $300{,}000$.

$939{,}515$ is between $939{,}510$ and $939{,}520$.

![A number line with the points 939,510 and 939,520 labeled](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/7a2e2f2f61f200d38bd4a35b4d5b5111f1e56a85)

Is $939{,}515$ closer to $939{,}510$ or $939{,}520$?

![The same number line as above, with the point 939,515 exactly halfway between the 2 points](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/60a4dca1e9247a1ccaab70c65cc2cebfa0d95714)

$939{,}515$ is equally close to both numbers, so we round to the higher number.
The nearest ten is $939{,}520$.

![The same number line as above, with the point 2767,545 exactly halfway between the 2 points](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/078a27bcea321e327ed5c84cc3bc49a5297bdd50)

$2{,}767{,}545$ is equally close to both numbers, so we round to the higher number.
The nearest ten is $2{,}767{,}550$.

$8{,}250$ is between $8{,}200$ and $8{,}300$.

![A number line with the points 8,200 and 8,300 labeled](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/ec166b11ddeb16b43d4b68f8d23bd5330f309444)

Is $8{,}250$ closer to $8{,}200$ or $8{,}300$?

![The same number line as above, with the point 8250 exactly halfway between the 2 points](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/671ec016fa2401d6eba1ab5c03f18b37b7745a55)

$8{,}250$ is equally close to both numbers, so we round to the higher number.
The nearest hundred is $8{,}300$.

$653{,}500$ is between $653{,}000$ and $654{,}000$.

![A number line with the points 653,000 and 654,000 labeled](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/dc21fba8709dff37cd1e4aa61a4b5d7abda9b6ec)

Is $653{,}500$ closer to $653{,}000$ or $654{,}000$?

![The same number line as above, with the point 653,500 exactly halfway between the 2 points](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/821094945e2ede461d907a1aa7ef58fd1690ed69)

$653{,}500$ is equally close to both numbers, so we round to the higher number.
The nearest thousand is $654{,}000$.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Round $25{,}000$ to the nearest ten thousand.**

[[☃ numeric-input 1]]
hints:
$25{,}000$ is between $20{,}000$ and $30{,}000$.

![A number line with the points 20,000 and 30,000 labeled](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/b3abedf114483c4cd375f931fa51943fa375fdf7)

Is $25{,}000$ closer to $20{,}000$ or $30{,}000$?

![The same number line as above, with the point 25,000 exactly halfway between the 2 points](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/e579349e519d17719a5fa9fe3f4bc527e2b8c1c2)

$25{,}000$ is equally close to both numbers, so we round to the higher number.
The nearest ten thousand is $30{,}000$.

$101$ is between $100$ and $110$.

![A number line with the points 100 and 110 labeled](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/86aac0c61e320e1bfe29bf70675d29ab8c5f8938)

Is $101$ closer to $100$ or $110$?

![The same number line as above, with the point 101 appearing closer to point 100](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/1d469e1fff1a289c9416e69eaf570c0edd4df944)

$101$ is closer to $100$.
The nearest ten is $100$.

$62{,}394$ is between $62{,}390$ and $62{,}400$.

![A number line with the points 62,390 and 62,400 labeled](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/9d0ee921cbcab5cf3c47d5ac9c3f0ea88717e49d)

Is $62{,}394$ closer to $62{,}390$ or $62{,}400$?

![The same number line as above, with the point 62,394 appearing closer to point 62,390](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/26b0cfe99f7d42d9bebb1d48ac8b3fa8f8ff73d9)

$62{,}394$ is closer to $62{,}390$.
The nearest ten is $62{,}390$.

$703$ is between $700$ and $800$.

![A number line with the points 700 and 800 labeled](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/524f6d6b00839fd81503e2158c4ae753bf76da69)

Is $703$ closer to $700$ or $800$?

![The same number line as above, with the point 703 appearing closer to point 700](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/cafd205d77b6d030c6a41c12ac85fe78dc8bb1da)

$703$ is closer to $700$.
The nearest hundred is $700$.

Is $2{,}826$ closer to $2{,}800$ or $2{,}900$?

![The same number line as above, with the point 2,826 appearing closer to point 2,800](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/2867c1686fdc703f58084bb4277dbe12f0fc98e5)

$2{,}826$ is closer to $2{,}800$.
The nearest hundred is $2{,}800$.

Is $4{,}358$ closer to $4{,}000$ or $5{,}000$?

![The same number line as above, with the point 4358 appearing closer to point 4000](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/2eab13ff4dd242caafa5a3b2c95aece82a2b06b1)

$4{,}358$ is closer to $4{,}000$.
The nearest thousand is $4{,}000$.

![The same number line as above, with the point 7,412 appearing closer to point 7,000](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/c40a727aaaa92b11e3d6520ede7b892892476c5a)

assessment_items.question_content:
**Round $34{,}699$ to the nearest ten thousand.**

[[☃ numeric-input 1]]
hints:
$34{,}699$ is between $30{,}000$ and $40{,}000$.

![A number line with the points 30,000 and 40,000 labeled](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/468f2d6a64f406ef94c90fbaad0018fd8fe9cdaf)

Is $34{,}699$ closer to $30{,}000$ or $40{,}000$?

![The same number line as above, with the point 34,699 appearing closer to point 30,000](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/26fac1b71261338b4981998d6cc75a1f5dbed5e7)

$34{,}699$ is closer to $30{,}000$.
The nearest ten thousand is $30{,}000$.
